action.reasoning: Observation: I've been consistently having issues with the model architecture where the CLIP model is loading text components even when I'm trying to use only the vision model. The validation accuracy is still very low (~9.35%) which is close to random guessing. The problem is that I'm using the full CLIP model and then extracting the vision model, which still retains references to text components. I need to use the CLIPVisionModel directly without going through the full CLIP model. Looking at the Hugging Face documentation, I should use CLIPVisionModel directly from transformers.models.clip.modeling_clip.
